title: Chinese Buddhist: Lankavatara Sutra (Gunabhadra) (1)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Lankavatara Sutra (Gunabhadra)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Lankavatara Sutra (Gunabhadra)

translation.text: From Lankavatara Sutra (Gunabhadra): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
